prompt: Starting from a populated `LFPBandV1` row, list all upstream tables whose entries it depends on. I want to know the minimum set I'd need to re-create this from scratch.
behavioral_checks: Names every upstream table including the parameter (FirFilterParameters) and selection tables (LFPSelection, LFPBandSelection)

Names the Raw table as the data source fetched inside LFPV1's `make()` body (Raw is not an FK of LFPSelection; it is pulled via `(Raw & key).fetch_nwb()` at make() time and must be present to regenerate LFPV1 from scratch)
Does not skip the LFPOutput merge wrapper between LFPV1 and LFPBandSelection
